title: Implement assisted regeneration works
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement assisted regeneration works demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Interpret work requirements for site

pcs.text: Conduct site inspection to identify intact ecological features and potential threats to regeneration species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct site inspection to identify intact ecological features and potential threats to regeneration species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct site inspection to identify intact ecological features and potential threats to regeneration species.

pcs.text: Record the ecosystems and communities present on site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record the ecosystems and communities present on site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record the ecosystems and communities present on site.

pcs.text: Identify boundaries of the assisted regeneration zones for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify boundaries of the assisted regeneration zones for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify boundaries of the assisted regeneration zones for site.

pcs.text: Identify factors preventing natural recovery of biota across site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify factors preventing natural recovery of biota across site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify factors preventing natural recovery of biota across site.

pcs.text: Identify assisted primary and secondary regeneration treatments to trigger recovery of species for ecosystem
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify assisted primary and secondary regeneration treatments to trigger recovery of species for ecosystem?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify assisted primary and secondary regeneration treatments to trigger recovery of species for ecosystem.

pcs.text: Identify timing of primary and secondary treatments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify timing of primary and secondary treatments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify timing of primary and secondary treatments.
